title: myosotis rehsteineri
intro: Myosotis rehsteineri, also known as Alpine forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family, native to the European Alps and other mountainous regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Myosotis rehsteineri include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory ailments.
